memory.summary: I have a free afternoon and low stress, so attending the leisure event seems like a good way to relax before starting my term project later.
My project progress is minimal, and procrastinating increases future stress. I need to start working immediately instead of relaxing.
After 2 hours of focused work, my project progress nearly doubled to 47%. However, I remain stressed with only 3 days left and a sleep debt.
Worked 2 hours, progress jumped from 0.47 to 0.61. Still stressed with 3 days left and sleep debt.
Progress increased from 0.61 to 0.70 in two hours, yet I still face high stress and sleep debt with only three days remaining.
I just spent an hour on a trivial task that barely moved the needle, missing its deadline. My stress and sleep debt remain high despite recent progress gains.
Progress on the Term project increased from 0.70 to 0.78 in two hours, but my high stress and sleep debt remain unchanged with only three days left.
I made a small progress gain on the Term project, but my stress and sleep debt remain critically high with only three days left.
After only two hours of sleep, my energy is low at 2.4 while stress remains critically high with three days left on the Term project.
My Term project progress jumped from 0.82 to 0.91 in two hours, nearly completing it with three days left.
Despite my stress and low energy, the Term project is nearly complete. Letting the moment pass means I must now manage the final days without further progress gains.
I worked 1.5 hours, raising project progress from 0.91 to 0.97 while managing low energy and high stress.
